lines: iby' isi Yesu yabinkuyemo: ubw' amaraso, ntibinkang' ubu. nunamy' imbere y'Umusaraba; Yesu yanyejeje de mu maraso ye.
Jye nkunda... jye nkunda...Umukiza wanjye Wanyiguriy' i Gologota ku Giti.
Nari nazimiriye mu byaha, Nd' imbata y'ishyari n'inzangano, Umunsi w'amateka
Jye nar' imbat' amp' umudendezo;  Jye nar' impumyi, arampumura; Jye nari
intumbi, maz' aranzura ! Nimwumv' ayo mahoro Yesu yampaye!
